title: Gloom Gear
description: A GUI resource pack that redefines your Minecraft interface with deep hues, intricate machinery, gears, conduits, and ethereal glows.This resource pack gives you a different feel with an immersive dark mechanical GUI.
body:
![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0347220e9c858f16253bc1ed99b9e9ddc40ddedd.png)

## **Gloom Gear** 

_——The Precision Soul pulsating in the Shadows._

Step into a world where gears whisper and steel breathes. The GloomGear resource pack completely overhauls Minecraft's UI, merging a gothic gloom aesthetic with the hardcore functionalism of industrial machinery. Every pixel is meticulously crafted to make you feel like you're not just clicking menus, but operating a vast, complex, and ancient machine brimming with latent power.

## **_Installation & Feedback:_**

1. Download the GloomGear resource pack file.
2. Place it into your Minecraft game's resourcepacks folder.
3. Activate it in-game via "Options" -> "Resource Packs".
4. Immerse yourself in the world of gloom and gears!

### **_Just keep in mind:_**

 - **_Make sure to credit, and don't claim Gloom Gear as your own creation._**
- **_You may create or edit assets in the pack for compatibility with other mod's UIs._**
- **_Gloom Gear GUI updates slowly. If you want to download the latest version, please [click here](https://github.com/RoyalBronzeror/Gloom-Gear-GUI/). You can also report issues [here](https://github.com/RoyalBronzeror/Gloom-Gear-GUI/issues)._**
